rule: Body text must meet WCAG AA 4.5:1 contrast against its background
UI component borders and large text must meet WCAG AA 3:1
Interactive elements must show a visible focus ring in all themes
Icon-only buttons must have aria-label or visible text
Honor prefers-reduced-motion for all non-essential animation
Primary tap targets must be at least 24x24 CSS pixels (44x44 preferred on touch)
Use at most two type families in a system (one heading + one body)
Pick a scale ratio (1.125 / 1.25 / 1.333) and apply it consistently
Body line length between 45 and 75 characters for readability
Spacing scale must be a geometric or arithmetic sequence (e.g. 4 8 12 16 24 32 48 64)
Ship a 5-stop neutral scale minimum for surfaces and borders
Ship semantic colors for success / warning / danger at minimum
Every color token has a dark-mode counterpart or an explicit "light-only" note
Use at most three radius values (small / medium / pill)
Transition durations between 120ms and 240ms for most UI
Default easing is ease-out for entrances ease-in for exits
Each component declares states: default hover active disabled focus
Offer at most two density modes (compact / comfortable)
Use a 12-column grid for desktop; 4-column for mobile
Four breakpoints maximum: sm md lg xl
Every form field has a visible label (not placeholder-only)
Error messages appear adjacent to the field and are aria-describedby linked
Icons ship at 16 / 20 / 24 / 32 CSS pixels — pick two sizes for the system
Every list / table / search has a designed empty state
Use skeleton screens for content longer than 400ms to load
Every async surface shows a retry-able error state
Action buttons use verbs; destructive actions name the object (Delete project)
